specSection:
REQUIRED_COLUMNS := ["Proposal", "Plan", "Backlog", "Ready", "In Progress", "Done", "Needs Human"]
verifyColumns :: [String] → [String]
verifyColumns(required) = required ∖ existingColumns()
ground_truth_rationale: Missing columns: 'In Progress' and 'Needs Human' are absent from existingColumns. The set difference yields exactly these two.
